title: Withdrawal Status Response
description: Current status of the requested withdrawal.

status.description: Current status of the withdrawal. Poll until it reaches `complete`, `rejected`, or `failed`.

transaction_id.description: Identifier of the transaction. May be null in some cases regardless of `status`.

metadata.description: Request metadata included in every response.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

timing.description: Time in seconds for the service to process the request.
